Case Study

Mosaico

Contribution work on an open data platform for robotics and physical AI.

Upstream contribution Python Robotics Physical AI Data Platform Open Source

Why it matters

Robotics and physical-AI systems need data platform primitives that remain understandable once experiments become real operations.

Technical center

The interesting work sits at integration boundaries: how orchestration stays flexible enough for experimentation while remaining debuggable for the next engineer.

What to show next

A concrete upstream diff and one end-to-end workflow trace would turn this from a platform overview into a real contribution story.

Repository Related article
Demo surface

A future flow capture from a representative robotics or physical-AI data workflow.

Contribution note

A short note on the concrete upstream contribution and the design tradeoff it changed.
